parameters:
Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at the
bonfire.)

You need a torch to light a bonfire (Make one at the
workbench.)

You can now take a shortcut from the magic circle to
the base's coastline.

It seems this is as far as I go... I'll entrust my
equipment to another player... it says.
Whoa...! This feels like the final dungeon...!

Seriously... if you keep jumping around like that,
you'll fall~?

(Why is it... I wanted to go back to our original
world so badly... but now...)
